name: Ayesha Khan
title: Even prettier in person
review: Ordered the kundan set for my cousin’s sangeet — stones catch light so well in photos. Clasp feels secure; wore it all evening with no irritation. Took one extra day to ship but the box was padded properly.

name: Priya Sharma
title: Lightweight jhumkas
review: My ears are sensitive to heavy earrings — these are surprisingly light for the size. Pearl drops don’t tangle in my hair. Colleagues at work asked if they were ‘real’ kundan lol.

name: Neha Verma
title: Solid for the price
review: Was nervous buying bridal jewellery online — finish is neat, no rough edges behind the ear. 4.5 only because the outer carton had a small dent; the velvet box inside was fine.

name: Riya Patel
title: Diwali gifting
review: Bought two pairs of earrings for relatives — both came in separate pouches inside one gift box. They loved the meenakari detail. No plastic wrap, which I liked.

name: Kavita Reddy
title: Comfortable after day one
review: Choker sat a bit stiff the first time I tried it — by day two it sat flat on the neck. CS replied on WhatsApp about adjusting the chain length — helpful.

name: Simran Kaur
title: Mom approved
review: Sent a necklace set for my parents’ anniversary. She said the gold-tone plating looks even, not patchy. The handwritten note in the box was a nice touch.

name: Meera Joshi
title: Second order
review: First was stud earrings; this time a long necklace. Same quality of setting as before. Watched their reel for styling — helped with the drape.

name: Ananya Desai
title: Not tacky, looks expensive
review: Compared to random marketplace jewellery — this looks finished, not plasticky. I store it in the pouch they sent; no tarnish so far after 3 weeks.

name: Shruti Iyer
title: Fair for handwork
review: You can see the kundan work up close. Delivery person called before handing over. Invoice had the correct spelling on the gift tag.

name: Pooja Hegde
title: Sale order still came fast
review: Ordered on a long weekend, reached Thursday. Pieces were in individual cloth wraps inside the box — no rattling.

name: Tanya Bhatia
title: We both wear them
review: I kept the maang tikka, sister took the matching earrings. Hooks feel strong — one month of occasional wear, no loosening.

name: Sakshi Nair
title: Doesn’t look cheap
review: I usually stick to gold shops — tried this for a fusion outfit. Pearls are evenly matched; doesn’t scream ‘costume’ in daylight.

name: Divya Agarwal
title: Guests noticed
review: Wore the choker to a house party. Two people asked where it’s from. Bit more than I wanted to spend but the weight feels justified.

name: Aditi Rao
title: Matches the photos
review: Colour of the beads is same as on site — not a totally different shade like some brands. Matte gold areas look intentional, not dull.

name: Geeta Singh
title: Saw on Instagram reel
review: Ordered after seeing a styling clip. Necklace has a nice weight — feels substantial, not flimsy thin metal.

name: Roshni M.
review: Choker — sits well on a cream saree blouse.

name: Smriti K.
review: Jhumkas are different from usual — in a good way.

name: Jhanvi T.
review: Nice. Wish the chain was slightly longer but ok.

name: Alia S.
review: Packed safe, reached on time.

name: Deepa R.
review: Plating still even — 3 weeks in.

name: Nikita P.
review: Ear wire feels sturdy.

name: Vandana F.
review: Happy with buy. Will order again.

name: Sanjana W.
review: Bracelet neat — fits my wrist + small adjustment holes.

name: Ishita B.
review: Sis ordered the same week lol.

name: Mansi C.
review: Clasp smooth. Stone colour ok.

name: Pallavi G.
review: Gifted — they sent a thank-you voice note.

name: Kirti D.
review: As shown. No surprises.

name: Richa V.
review: Pearl lustre subtle — like it.

name: Farah A.
review: Would buy another finish if they launch.

name: Natasha K.
review: Tracking worked. No CS drama.

name: Ritu S.
review: Maang tikka didn’t slip — danced full baraat.

name: Preeti L.
review: Nose ring comfortable — wore 6 hours straight.

name: Nisha O.
review: Set matches my maroon silk — exact tone.

name: Tarun H.
review: Bought for wife — she wears daily now.
